stories.title: Takeaways: Spurs defeat defending champions in Gam...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next for the Spurs-Thunder series.

stories.title: Wemby spoils SGA's MVP night as Spurs stun OKC
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 41 points and 24 rebounds in a statement performance on Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's MVP night.

stories.title: 'I have to be better,' SGA says of MVP night letdo...
stories.summary: After being presented his second straight MVP trophy in a pregame ceremony Monday, Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, by his own admission, didn't perform up to that lofty standard in a thrilling Western Conference finals opener against the Spurs.

stories.title: Canadiens outlast Sabres in overtime in Game 7
stories.summary: Alex Newhook scored his second Game 7-winning goal of the postseason, this time in overtime in the Canadiens' victory over the Sabres on Monday night.

stories.title: Defeated Sabres proud of franchise's 'giant step'
stories.summary: Though their renaissance season ended with an emotional 3-2 overtime loss to the Montreal Canadiens in Game 7, the Buffalo Sabres skated off the ice Monday to a standing ovation after a historic campaign that saw the end of a 14-season playoff drought.
